title: Application of dual Nr4a1-GFP Nr4a3-Tocky reporter mice to study T cell receptor signaling
author: Jennings, Lecky, et al.
materials: Anti CD69 AF700 Armenian hamster monoclonal H1.2F3
Anti CD103 PE Armenian hamster monoclonal 2E7
Anti CX3CR1 BV605 mouse monoclonal SA011F11
Anti CD11c BV711 Armenian hamster monoclonal N418
Anti-TCRbeta PerCP-Cy5.5 Armenian hamster monoclonal H57-597
Applied Biosystems SYBR green power up master mix

steps.title: Staining for flow cytometric analysis
steps.instruction: Timing: 0.5–1 h13.Centrifuge culture plate at 500 × g for 3 min, flick plate to decant supernatant and while still inverted blot against paper towel.14.Add 25 μL of staining mix prepared as below in 2% FBS PBS (v/v). In our hands viability dye staining can be performed simultaneously with surface staining without adversely affecting performance.Note: Include single color compensation controls in addition to GFP, Timer-Blue, and Timer-Red.StainStain dilutionViability Dye eFluor7801 in 2,000CD4 BUV3951 in 200CD8 BUV7371 in 200CD69 AF7001 in 50Optional PEcy7Optional stainOptional APCOptional stainOptional PerCP-Cy5.5Optional stain / DUMP15.Incubate for 20 min at 4°C.16.Add 180 μL of wash buffer to each well and centrifuge plate at 500 × g for 3 min, flick plate to decant supernatant and while still inverted blot against paper towel.17.Resuspend pellet in 150 μL 2% FBS PBS and transfer to 5 mL FACS tube (BD Biosciences). Wash well with 150 μL 2% FBS PBS and transfer to FACS tube to make 300 μL final volume.18.Place on ice in the dark and acquire samples on the flow cytometer within 2 h of staining.CRITICAL: Cells should be analyzed as soon as possible following staining. In our hands, slow maturation of Blue to Red can occur after prolonged periods (e.g., overnight) at 4°C.

steps.title: Quantification and statistical analysis
steps.instruction: To determine the percentage positivity, a non-transgenic line can be used to set the threshold for Nr4a1-GFP and Nr4a3-Blue positivity. Given that Nr4a1-GFP has higher background expression it is important that the data are normalized to the minimum at T=0 min and maximum at T=240 min using the following formulas:Nr4a1-GFP Normalized=%Nr4a1-GFP in condition−%Nr4a1-GFP at T=0%Nr4a1-GFP at T=240−%Nr4a1-GFP at T=0×100Nr4a3-Blue Normalized=%Nr4a3-Blue in condition−%Nr4a3-Blue at T=0%Nr4a3-Blue at T=240−%Nr4a3-Blue at T=0×100
